title: Supervise animal health programs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Supervise animal health programs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor and assess animal health

pcs.text: Conduct regular observations to assess animal health
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct regular observations to assess animal health?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct regular observations to assess animal health.

pcs.text: Recognise and report symptoms of ill health and common diseases or parasite infestations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and report symptoms of ill health and common diseases or parasite infestations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and report symptoms of ill health and common diseases or parasite infestations.

pcs.text: Sample and arrange testing for internal parasites or diseases where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sample and arrange testing for internal parasites or diseases where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sample and arrange testing for internal parasites or diseases where required.

pcs.text: Seek veterinary advice for suspected disease outbreaks where required, according to biosecurity legislation and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek veterinary advice for suspected disease outbreaks where required, according to biosecurity legislation and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek veterinary advice for suspected disease outbreaks where required, according to biosecurity legislation and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Report notifiable diseases and comply with all restrictions and treatment requirements where required, according to biosecurity legislation and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report notifiable diseases and comply with all restrictions and treatment requirements where required, according to biosecurity legislation and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report notifiable diseases and comply with all restrictions and treatment requirements where required, according to biosecurity legislation and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record animal health status
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record animal health status?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record animal health status.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE), and maintain hygiene measures applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE), and maintain hygiene measures applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE), and maintain hygiene measures applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Monitor and record animal welfare status according to legislation and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and record animal welfare status according to legislation and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and record animal welfare status according to legislation and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Dispose of deceased animals according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of deceased animals according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of deceased animals according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Monitor and assess animal health

elements.title: Implement preventative health strategies

pcs.text: Identify risks to animal health, and source strategies from the production plan, relevant expert or specialist consultant where applicable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify risks to animal health, and source strategies from the production plan, relevant expert or specialist consultant where applicable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify risks to animal health, and source strategies from the production plan, relevant expert or specialist consultant where applicable.

pcs.text: Develop and implement a vaccination program to control clostridial and other diseases
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and implement a vaccination program to control clostridial and other diseases?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and implement a vaccination program to control clostridial and other diseases.

pcs.text: Identify livestock prone to internal parasite build-up and plan out the timing of treatments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify livestock prone to internal parasite build-up and plan out the timing of treatments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify livestock prone to internal parasite build-up and plan out the timing of treatments.

pcs.text: Implement or research pest and disease control strategies according to pasture spelling and rotations of different classes of livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement or research pest and disease control strategies according to pasture spelling and rotations of different classes of livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement or research pest and disease control strategies according to pasture spelling and rotations of different classes of livestock.

pcs.text: Plan an integrated approach to health treatments for animals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan an integrated approach to health treatments for animals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan an integrated approach to health treatments for animals.

pcs.text: Use drenches, vaccines and other stock medications according to manufacturer instructions, and comply with withholding periods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use drenches, vaccines and other stock medications according to manufacturer instructions, and comply with withholding periods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use drenches, vaccines and other stock medications according to manufacturer instructions, and comply with withholding periods.

pcs.text: Apply strategies to minimise parasite resistance to anthelmintics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply strategies to minimise parasite resistance to anthelmintics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply strategies to minimise parasite resistance to anthelmintics.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Implement preventative health strategies

elements.title: Record and review the animal health program

pcs.text: Record treatments including batch numbers and date of expiry, and maintain an inventory of stock medicines according to regulations and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record treatments including batch numbers and date of expiry, and maintain an inventory of stock medicines according to regulations and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record treatments including batch numbers and date of expiry, and maintain an inventory of stock medicines according to regulations and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Record health issues and the results of tissue, organ and blood samples according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record health issues and the results of tissue, organ and blood samples according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record health issues and the results of tissue, organ and blood samples according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Use records of health tests and animal health treatments, including animal production records, to review the animal health plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use records of health tests and animal health treatments, including animal production records, to review the animal health plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use records of health tests and animal health treatments, including animal production records, to review the animal health plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Record and review the animal health program

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
